hypercards: Description (User card): Stores details about Cards issued to users, including card info, limits, statuses, KYC, transactions, and other metadata.
(hypercards) _id (ObjectId): Unique identifier for the card record.
(hypercards) userId (ObjectId): References the user who owns the card.
(hypercards) cardTypeId (String, required): Internal ID of the card type and **for specific card type go to hypercardtypes.cardType with cardTypeId for matching.**
(hypercards) cardNumber (String, required): Card number issued to the user.
(hypercards) cardId (String): Internal card ID assigned by the system or provider.
(hypercards) email (String, required): User email associated with the card.
(hypercards) firstName (String, required): First name of the cardholder.
(hypercards) lastName (String, required): Last name of the cardholder.
(hypercards) mobile (String, required): Mobile number of the cardholder.
(hypercards) phone (String, default=null): Optional secondary phone number.
(hypercards) mobileCode (String, required): Mobile country code.
(hypercards) preApply (Boolean, default=false): Indicates if card was pre-applied.
(hypercards) mcTradeNo (String, required): Merchant trade number or reference.
(hypercards) addressLine1 (String, required): Address line 1 for the cardholder.
(hypercards) addressLine2 (String, required): Address line 2 for the cardholder.
(hypercards) city (String, required): Cardholder city.
(hypercards) country (String, required): Cardholder country.
(hypercards) postalCode (String, required): Postal code for the cardholder.
(hypercards) state (String, required): State or region.
(hypercards) shippingAddress (Object): Optional shipping address object.
(hypercards) cardApplyStatus (Number, default=0): Status of card application: 0=pending, 1=success, 2=fail.
(hypercards) cardIdStatus (Number, default=0): Status of card ID issuance: 0=pending, 1=success, 2=fail.
(hypercards) maxAmountDaily (Number): Maximum daily spending limit.
(hypercards) maxAmountMonthly (Number): Maximum monthly spending limit.
(hypercards) maxAmountSingle (Number): Maximum single transaction limit.
(hypercards) cardFreezeStatus (Number, default=2): 0=pending, 1=frozen, 2=unfrozen
(hypercards) cardFreezeRequestStatus (Number): Status of freeze request: 0=pending, 1=success, 2=fail.
(hypercards) paymentStatus (Number, default=0): 0=pending, 1=processing, 2=complete.
(hypercards) cardCreatedStatus (Number, 0=Not created , 1=created card): Status of card creation.
(hypercards) cardShipStatus (Number, default=0): Shipping status of card.
(hypercards) txId (String): Transaction ID associated with card creation or top-up.
(hypercards) bankCardInfo (Object, default=null): Bank card metadata.
(hypercards) currencyId (ObjectId): References currency used in transactions.
(hypercards) amount (Number): Card balance or top-up amount.
(hypercards) cardTopupFee (Number): Fee for card top-up.
(hypercards) minOneTimeSpent (Number, default=config.MIN_ONE_TIME_SPENT_LIMIT): Minimum spend per transaction.
(hypercards) maxOneTimeSpent (Number, default=config.MAX_ONE_TIME_SPENT_LIMIT): Maximum spend per transaction.
(hypercards) isDelete (Number, default=0): Soft delete flag.
(hypercards) dailyLimit, monthlyLimit, yearlyLimit, weeklyLimit, transactionLimit (Number, default=0): Spending limits by period.
(hypercards) nickName (String): Optional nickname for the card.
(hypercards) label (String): Optional label for card.
(hypercards) isAdmin (Number): Flag if card is admin-owned.
(hypercards) physicalCardStatus (Number, default=0): 0=pending, 1=assigned.
(hypercards) cardActivationStatus (Number, default=0): 0=pending, 1=active, 2=inactive.
(hypercards) failureCount (Number, default=0): Number of failed transactions or attempts.
(hypercards) hyperKycStatus (Number, default=0): 1=pending, 2=success.
(hypercards) enable3DSAuthentication (Number, default=0): 0=pending, 1=enabled.
(hypercards) enable3DSBiometricEnroll (Number, default=0): 0=pending, 1=enabled.
(hypercards) enable3DSSmsEnroll (Number, default=1): 0=pending, 1=enabled.
(hypercards) kycMcTradeNo (String): KYC merchant trade number.
(hypercards) customerShippingDetails (Object): Customer shipping info object.
(hypercards) cardHolderId (String): Cardholder ID.
(hypercards) deleteByReason (Number): 1=deleted by user, 2=deleted by admin.
(hypercards) deletedAt (Date): Timestamp of deletion.
(hypercards) applycharges, initialAmount, providerEarned, oppiEarned, usdPrice (Number): Financial tracking fields.
(hypercards) isUsingRefferal (Number, default=0): Flag if referral was used.
(hypercards) cardHolderRejectReason (String): Reason card was rejected by holder.
(hypercards) cardViewUrl (String): URL to view card.
(hypercards) availableBalance (Number, default=0): Available card balance.
(hypercards) failedTransactionCount (Number, default=0): Number of failed transactions.
(hypercards) freezeBy, unFreezeBy (ObjectId): References the user/admin who froze/unfroze the card.
(hypercards) apiSuccess (Number): Flag if API call succeeded.
(hypercards) cardCreatedCharges (Number): Charges for card creation.
(hypercards) deleteReason (String): Reason for deletion.
(hypercards) isFailedTransaction (Number): 1=freeze/delete due to failed transaction.
(hypercards) createdAt (Date, auto-generated): Timestamp of creation.
(hypercards) updatedAt (Date, auto-generated): Timestamp of last update.
bybertransactionhistories: Description: (User card transaction history) Stores detailed records of user transactions related to card's payments, including amounts, fees, status, currency, merchant info, commissions, and referral usage.
(bybertransactionhistories) _id (ObjectId): Unique identifier for the transaction record.
(bybertransactionhistories) userId (ObjectId, default=null): References the 'users' collection. Identifies the user involved in the transaction.
(bybertransactionhistories) cardId (ObjectId): References the card used for the transaction, if applicable.
(bybertransactionhistories) bookingId (ObjectId): References the flight or hotel booking associated with the transaction, if applicable.
(bybertransactionhistories) amount (Number): Transaction amount in the specified currency.
(bybertransactionhistories) total (Number): Total amount including fees.
(bybertransactionhistories) fees (Number): Transaction fees applied.
(bybertransactionhistories) type (Number, required): Transaction type identifier. Types : 1 for transaction (consumed); 2 for recharge (top-up)
(bybertransactionhistories) note (String): Optional note describing the transaction.
(bybertransactionhistories) txId (String): Unique transaction ID generated by the system.
(bybertransactionhistories) txHash (String): Blockchain transaction hash, if applicable.
(bybertransactionhistories) currency (String): Currency code used in the transaction.
(bybertransactionhistories) currencyId (ObjectId): References the currency used in the transaction.
(bybertransactionhistories) merchantAmount (String): Amount recorded on the merchant side.
(bybertransactionhistories) merchantCurrency (String): Currency used by the merchant.
(bybertransactionhistories) merchantCountry (String): Country of the merchant.
(bybertransactionhistories) merchantTxId (String): Merchant's transaction ID.
(bybertransactionhistories) lifecycleEventId (String): Identifier for transaction lifecycle events.
(bybertransactionhistories) clientTransactionId (String): Client-side transaction identifier.
(bybertransactionhistories) status (Number, default=0): Status of the transaction (0=Pending, 1=Success, 2=Fail, 3=Refund).
(bybertransactionhistories) errorCode (Mixed): Error code if the transaction failed.
(bybertransactionhistories) errorMessage (String): Description of the error if applicable.
(bybertransactionhistories) eventType (String): Type of event associated with this transaction.
(bybertransactionhistories) description (String): Optional description of the transaction.
(bybertransactionhistories) settleAmount (String): Settled amount for the transaction.
(bybertransactionhistories) settleCurrency (String): Currency used for settlement.
(bybertransactionhistories) settleDate (String): Date when the settlement occurred.
(bybertransactionhistories) prevBalance (Number, default=0): User's balance before this transaction.
(bybertransactionhistories) currentBalance (Number, default=0): User's balance after this transaction.
(bybertransactionhistories) rechargeByAdmin (ObjectId): References the admin who recharged the account, if applicable.
(bybertransactionhistories) adminCommission (Number): Commission percentage taken by admin.
(bybertransactionhistories) adminCommissionAmount (Number): Commission amount taken by admin.
(bybertransactionhistories) providerCommission (Number): Commission percentage for the provider.
(bybertransactionhistories) providerCommissionAmount (Number): Commission amount for the provider.
(bybertransactionhistories) isUsingRefferal (Number, default=0): Indicates if a referral was used (0=No, 1=Yes).
(bybertransactionhistories) addInRefferal (Number): Amount added to referral balance, if any.
(bybertransactionhistories) createdAt (Date, auto-generated): Timestamp of when the transaction document was created.
(bybertransactionhistories) updatedAt (Date, auto-generated): Timestamp of when the transaction document was last updated.
hypercardtypes: Description (**Card Type details aligned with hypercards.cardTypeId**): Stores metadata and configuration for different Card types, including fees, limits, KYC requirements, and display settings.
(hypercardtypes) _id (ObjectId): Unique identifier for the card type record.
(hypercardtypes) cardTypeId (String): Internal ID of the card type.
(hypercardtypes) cardType (String): Type name of the card, Names: 'Virtual Card', 'Physical Card', 'Travel Card'.
(hypercardtypes) cardImage (String): URL or path of the card image.
(hypercardtypes) cardName (String): Display name of the card.
(hypercardtypes) cardAssoc (String): Associated provider or brand name.
(hypercardtypes) applyCharge (Number): Charge for applying this card type.
(hypercardtypes) initialAmount (Number): Default initial amount loaded to the card.
(hypercardtypes) depositFees (Number): Fees applied when depositing to this card.
(hypercardtypes) oneTimeSpent (Number): Max single transaction limit.
(hypercardtypes) monthlySpent (Number): Max monthly spending limit.
(hypercardtypes) maxRechargeAmount (Number): Maximum allowed recharge amount.
(hypercardtypes) maxSingleRechargeAmount (Number): Max single recharge amount.
(hypercardtypes) minSingleRechargeAmount (Number): Min single recharge amount.
(hypercardtypes) cardCurrency (String): Currency associated with this card type.
(hypercardtypes) status (String): General status of the card type (active/inactive).
(hypercardtypes) isActive (Number, default=1): Flag if card type is active: 0=inactive, 1=active.
(hypercardtypes) isTravelCard (Number): Flag if the card is travel-specific.
(hypercardtypes) provider (String, default=null): Card provider name.
(hypercardtypes) isComingSoon (Boolean, default=false): Flag indicating if card type is upcoming.
(hypercardtypes) isKycRequired (Number, default=1): KYC required flag: 1=yes, 0=no.
(hypercardtypes) isEmailRequired (Number, default=0): Email required for this card type.
(hypercardtypes) isMobileRequired (Number, default=0): Mobile number required for this card type.
(hypercardtypes) isAbleToSetLimit (Number, default=0): Flag if user can set custom limits.
(hypercardtypes) isNicknameRequired (Number, default=0): Flag if nickname is required for this card type.
(hypercardtypes) isPinRequired (Number, default=0): Flag if PIN is required.
(hypercardtypes) isShippingDetailRequired (Number, default=0): Flag if shipping details are required.
(hypercardtypes) sequence (Number): Display order for UI.
(hypercardtypes) providerCommission (Number): Commission earned by provider.
(hypercardtypes) adminTopupFee (Number): Fee collected by admin for top-up.
(hypercardtypes) providerEarned (Number): Total earned by provider.
(hypercardtypes) cardDisplayFees (Number): Fees displayed to user.
(hypercardtypes) consumeFees (Number): Transaction consumption fees.
(hypercardtypes) createdAt (Date, auto-generated): Timestamp of record creation.
(hypercardtypes) updatedAt (Date, auto-generated): Timestamp of last update.
usercardtypelimits: Description: Stores per-user limits for different card types. Each key is a cardTypeId, and the value is the allowed limit for that card type.
(usercardtypelimits) userId (ObjectId): Reference to the user this limit applies to. Refers to MODEL_USER.
(usercardtypelimits) <cardTypeId> (Number): The key is the ID of a card type (like '111040', '537100'), and the value is the maximum number of that card type the user can have.
(usercardtypelimits) createdAt (Date): Timestamp of when the record was created.
(usercardtypelimits) updatedAt (Date): Timestamp of the last update to this record.
Relationships: **NOTE: This relationship is only for the your semantic understanding for correct query generation not part of the MongoDB schema itself.**
**IMPORTANT: For relational type of query where you have to fetch data from one table and then use that data to fetch from another table **Always use lookup query**. **
For card type detail : hypercardtypes.cardTypeId corresponds to hypercards.cardTypeId
